channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: At the corner Old road the road surface is poor, 2nd April
item.description:
The road surface at this junction requires attention as the surface is very poor could cause damage to cyclists and vehicles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working properly, 2nd April
item.description:
Light turns on and off after a few second

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover broken, 2nd April
item.description:
The cover and its frame have become loose again, resulting in a significant noise issue when buses drive over it - especially at night. The growing hole is also a real danger to bicycle. It has been previously reported to Bexley and then forwarded to Greenwich without further actions.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrow Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish and clothes., 2nd April
item.description:
Alley way dumping of clothes and general waste (some of which I cleaned myself last week but too much to deal with)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colville Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed mattress dumped on Luxborough lane in Chigwell, 2nd April
item.description:
Dumped by an individual called Danny Hurrell. He loves on 123 Valley Hill, Loughton, Essex IG10

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned cars, 2nd April
item.description:
Both sides and whole length of Rollins Street is being used as a dumping ground for cars, lorries, vans and tow trucks. Some of these vehicles have been dumped for over a year. Parking control and highways need to do their job properly. Get the yellow lines repainted. Complete the boxes for the controlled zone and start enforcing parking restrictions. It is a hazard, attracts criminals and is a safety issue. It’s evident no one visits, inspects, patrols or cares about this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes and trip hazards, 2nd April
item.description:
Ground floor of Tesco Elmer’s end car park needs resurfacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Margaret's Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: S541 not working, 2nd April
item.description:
One way system light S541 by no. 9 Curtismill Way not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Curtismill Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin never collected, 2nd April
item.description:
Could this bin please get collected as general waste it has been there now for nearly two months and starts to smell. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd April
item.description:
Appeared recently by the railings at the end of Watermint Quay. There's a potentially incriminating address on the plastic box (redacted on the photo).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 7, 2nd April
item.description:
Second time reporting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Oak Hill Park Mews, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 7, 2nd April
item.description:
Second time reporting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Oak Hill Park Mews, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car dumped for over a year, 2nd April
item.description:
Untaxed no MOT car dumped for over a year outside 43/45 Belmont Lane. Silver Vauxhall GK57 SFN

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to road surface by council engineers, 2nd April
item.description:
There was a new bike hub installed here a few days ago and has since been moved further DOWN Victoria Road, but the engineers have left the raised and very sharp fixtures in the parking bay surface. Anyone parking here will get a puncture.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction wasre, 2nd April
item.description:
Left a week ago please collect

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lansdowne Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars dumped on yellow lines, 2nd April
item.description:
These cars were dumped nearly a week ago 28th March and are still there nearly a week later 2nd April. I contacted Lewisham Council parking control on Monday and was told that parking enforcement patrol every day. The person I spoke to who refused to give his name said someone would attend that same day. The last picture was taken today 2nd April. Parking control definitely does not patrol everyday as these cars have not been ticketed once and are still there. This is causing an obstruction and near accidents as you cannot see into the turning. They have visible number plates so there is no excuse not to ticket them (one of the many excuses given).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown verge adjacent to my property, 2nd April
item.description:
The verge and area adjacent to Perry hall school is very overgrown and untidy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Polperro Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brocken fence, encroaching trees, 2nd April
item.description:
Fence brocken, wind moves it into our house. It has brocken trees

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Timberwharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 2nd April
item.description:
Never gets emptied. Its been months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Timberwharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Name plate of street name very faint, 2nd April
item.description:
Street name plate either side of Lambert street very faint

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Lofting Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
